# Autonoma Setup

## Required GitHub Secrets
- `AUTONOMA_CLIENT_ID` - Autonoma client ID
- `AUTONOMA_SECRET_ID` - Autonoma secret ID
- `AUTONOMA_PAIRING_CODE` - Pairing code for MCP onboarding

## How to configure
1. Install Autonoma MCP: `npx -y mcp-remote https://api.autonoma.app/v1/mcp/onboarding`
2. Use pairing code: S6CQ58G5
3. Add secrets to GitHub repo settings
